creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
Created attachment 192669
lang_mono-pkg-plist.patch

lang/mono does not properly clean up after itself due to the @postexec that generates the mono/certs/Trust hierarchy. This is not currently accounted for properly in the pkg-plist. poudriere output below. 

Attached patch resolves this by deleting the %%LOCALBASE%%/mono directory as a @postunexec and has been tested multiple times locally.

=>> Checking shared library dependencies
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libc.so.7]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libinotify.so.0]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libm.so.5]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libmonosgen-2.0.so.1]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libthr.so.3]
 0x0000000000000001 NEEDED               Shared library: [libz.so.6]
=======================<phase: deinstall      >============================

===>   Deinstalling mono-5.2.0.215

        mono-5.2.0.215

Number of packages to be removed: 1

The operation will free 214 MiB.
